name: ssot-rtl
description: SSOT->RTL seed template (used only before derive_rtl_todos.py generates rtl/rtl_todo_tracker.json). The authoritative internal ledger is rtl/rtl_todo_plan.json in the active IP root. When locked req contracts exist, the ledger also gates req/behavioral_contracts.json and req/structural_contracts.json directly instead of relying only on SSOT projection. Once derived, the UI TodoTracker shows one visible TODO per SSOT ledger group (phase) plus a final deterministic gen-rtl gate that loops back to Phase 1 until the ledger, compile, and lint close.

tasks.content: [gen-rtl] Generate RTL from SSOT contract ledger
tasks.detail: Read yaml/<ip>.ssot.yaml, rtl/rtl_todo_plan.json, rtl/rtl_authoring_plan.json, and relevant rtl/authoring_packets. Implement or repair RTL-owned artifacts only. Keep the per-contract rows in rtl_todo_plan.json as the internal evidence ledger, but use this single visible UI TODO for implementation, command gates, and repair loops.
tasks.criteria:
rtl_todo_plan.json exists and was generated from the current SSOT plus any locked req contract files
rtl_todo_tracker.json exists and contains the derived gen-rtl TodoTracker phases and final gate
RTL/filelist artifacts are implemented or repaired from SSOT authority and locked req contracts only
req/behavioral_contracts.json entries with RTL ownership have contract.behavioral.rtl rows with explicit rtl/rtl-gen stage_contracts and live RTL evidence
req/structural_contracts.json signals are checked directly against RTL top IO direction/width
If FL/CL artifacts are skipped, quality_gates.rtl_gen.direct_rtl_allowed is explicit and req/design_spec_trace.json plus locked contract implementation evidence close the direct RTL path
workflow/rtl-gen/scripts/derive_rtl_todos.py <ip> --root <project-root> --audit-rtl was run after the final RTL edit
workflow/rtl-gen/scripts/rtl_compile_report.py was run after the final RTL edit
workflow/lint/scripts/dut_lint_report.py was run after the final RTL edit
rtl_todo_plan.json gate.status is pass
open_required_todos=0, static_missing=0, blockers=0, orphans=0, all_required_todos_pass=true
Every required internal ledger row has todo_completion.status=pass
Compile and DUT-only lint have no unwaived errors
Any failed contract/gate row routes back into this same gen-rtl repair loop
